subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin! When thy letter appeared before the Throne, and thou didst ask therein what thou didst ask concerning God, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا زین المقربین فلما حضر بین یدی العرش کتابک و سئلت فیه ما سئلت عن الله ربک
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
